panels.speaker: cutting
panels.hindi: Nani ji, namaste! Main aapse milne aaya hoon.
panels.english: Nani-ji, hello! I came to meet you.
panels.pronunciation: NA-ni ji, na-mas-TE! MAIN AAP-se MIL-ne AA-ya hoon

panels.speaker: nani
panels.hindi: Arrey beta! Aa gaya tu? Joote yahin utaar de. Haath dho le.
panels.english: Oh child! You came? Take your shoes off here. Wash your hands.
panels.pronunciation: a-REY BE-ta! AA ga-YA tu? JOO-te ya-HIN u-TAAR de. HAATH DHO le

panels.speaker: nani
panels.hindi: Tu toh bahut patla ho gaya hai. Yeh poori, yeh sabzi, aur thoda halwa bhi.
panels.english: You've gotten so thin. Have this poori, this sabzi, and a bit of halwa too.
panels.pronunciation: TU toh ba-HUT PAT-la HO ga-ya hai. YEH POO-ri, YEH SAB-zi, aur THO-da HAL-wa bhi

panels.speaker: cutting
panels.hindi: Nani, bas! Bahut khaa liya. Pet bhar gaya.
panels.english: Nani, enough! I've eaten a lot. My stomach is full.
panels.pronunciation: NA-ni, BAS! ba-HUT KHAA li-YA. PET BHAR ga-ya

panels.speaker: nani
panels.hindi: Yeh dabba le ja. Ghar pe khaayega kal.
panels.english: Take this tiffin. You'll eat it at home tomorrow.
panels.pronunciation: YEH DAB-ba LE ja. GHAR pe KHAA-ye-ga KAL
